## Problem
<!-- What's painful today? Be specific. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What would solve it? Sketch the user-visible behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else did you think about? -->

## Scope
<!-- Is this a quick fix or a larger redesign? Does it touch the hook contract? -->

## Why now
<!-- What changed that makes this worth doing? -->
